title: Create: SkyeNet
description: The modpack for the create.skyemc.net server
body:
![the create mod logo with the skyenet logo as backkground with create computer craft icon in middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73bd8d2948e51a5c1a8ec16696b950be83a0ce61.png) Create : SkyeNet is a create modpack that is for the skyemc.net server network based on the mod [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) this modpack is for thos ewho like create and want to play with friends we have a server that is open join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/xjS7VKmamB) for the most updated; updates ### Server IP create.skyemc.net (in case that no work or play.skyenet.co.in - if you wanna like~ play on the normal network :3 mod list:
